title: Travel Guides
description: Plan, organize, and conduct long-distance travel, tours, and expeditions for individuals and groups.

tasks.text: Arrange for tour or expedition details such as accommodations, transportation, equipment, and the availability of medical personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan tour itineraries, applying knowledge of travel routes and destination sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Resolve any problems with itineraries, service, or accommodations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend to special needs of tour participants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate services received on the tour, and report findings to tour organizers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Give advice on sightseeing and shopping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer first aid to injured group participants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain hunting and fishing laws to groups to ensure compliance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lead individuals or groups to tour site locations and describe points of interest.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Pilot airplanes or drive land and water vehicles to transport tourists to activity or tour sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell or rent equipment, clothing, and supplies related to expeditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pay bills and record checks issued.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Verify amounts and quality of equipment prior to expeditions or tours.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct novices in climbing techniques, mountaineering, and wilderness survival, and demonstrate use of hunting, fishing, and climbing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up camps, and prepare meals for tour group members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide tourists with assistance in obtaining permits and documents such as visas, passports, and health certificates, and in converting currency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
